brief.description: Smallest useful context: matched nodes plus direct defining file/module.

callgraph.description: Callable neighborhood for callers, callees, and call expressions.

change_impact.description: Context for likely downstream impact of changing a symbol, including documentation and evidence.

docs.description: Documentation context connected to code artifacts.

runtime.description: Runtime surface context for routes, endpoints, queries, and secrets.

parser_node_mappings.description: Create one Module node per parser root or language namespace root.
parser_node_mappings.name: module

parser_node_mappings.description: Normalize import-like declarations across languages and attach imported names as metadata.
parser_node_mappings.name: imports

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture public export declarations and declarations marked as exported.
parser_node_mappings.name: exports

parser_node_mappings.description: Map class-like containers to Class nodes with a child Scope.
parser_node_mappings.name: classes

parser_node_mappings.context_rule: enclosing Class or Component changes the target node from Function to Method
parser_node_mappings.description: Create Function for module-level callables and Method when the callable is enclosed by Class or Component.
parser_node_mappings.name: functions_and_methods

parser_node_mappings.description: Create Parameter nodes for callable parameter declarations.
parser_node_mappings.name: parameters

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture explicit return type annotations.
parser_node_mappings.name: return_types

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture type annotation expressions attached to declarations.
parser_node_mappings.name: type_annotations

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture named type aliases.
parser_node_mappings.name: type_aliases

parser_node_mappings.description: Normalize assignments; scope, naming convention, and receiver decide variable, constant, or attribute node type.
parser_node_mappings.name: assignments

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture decorators, annotations, macros, or framework markers that modify declarations.
parser_node_mappings.name: decorators

parser_node_mappings.description: Create call-expression nodes and optionally resolve them to callable targets.
parser_node_mappings.name: calls

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture name and member references before or after semantic resolution.
parser_node_mappings.name: references

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture literals that are useful for docs, routes, queries, secrets, or assignment values.
parser_node_mappings.name: literals

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture branch and loop blocks when they affect reasoning or dependency paths.
parser_node_mappings.name: control_flow

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture exception raising and handling paths.
parser_node_mappings.name: exception_flow

parser_node_mappings.description: Create APIEndpoint and Route nodes from framework route declarations or decorated handlers.
parser_node_mappings.name: routes_and_endpoints

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture UI, service, runtime, or package components when extractor rules identify them.
parser_node_mappings.name: components

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture query strings or query builder expressions.
parser_node_mappings.name: queries

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture secret-looking names, environment references, keys, and credential handles.
parser_node_mappings.name: secrets

parser_node_mappings.description: Capture documentation sources and chunks from docs, comments, and docstrings.
parser_node_mappings.name: documentation

query_helpers.description: List high-level source roots, files, modules, dependencies, and runtime surfaces.
query_helpers.name: repository_overview
query_helpers.query: MATCH (n) WHERE n:SourceRoot OR n:File OR n:Module OR n:Dependency OR n:APIEndpoint OR n:Component RETURN n.id, n.label, n.path LIMIT 100

query_helpers.description: Find concrete semantic definitions by label or qualified name.
query_helpers.name: symbol_lookup
query_helpers.query: MATCH (s:Class) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Function) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Method) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Variable) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Constant) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:ClassAttribute) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:InstanceAttribute) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Property) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:Parameter) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path UNION ALL MATCH (s:TypeAlias) WHERE s.label = $name OR s.qualified_name = $name RETURN s.id, s.label, s.qualified_name, s.path LIMIT 25

query_helpers.description: Find a named class, function, method, variable, or constant definition.
query_helpers.name: definition_context
query_helpers.query: MATCH (d) WHERE d:Class OR d:Function OR d:Method OR d:Variable OR d:Constant RETURN d.id, d.label, d.kind, d.path LIMIT 50

query_helpers.description: Find call expressions and resolved callable targets near a symbol.
query_helpers.name: callgraph_neighborhood
query_helpers.query: MATCH (c:CallExpression)-[:FROM_ResolvesTo]->(:ResolvesTo)-[:TO_ResolvesTo]->(target) RETURN c.id, c.path, target.id, target.label LIMIT 50

query_helpers.name: dependency_map
query_helpers.query: MATCH (i:ImportDeclaration)-[:FROM_DependsOn]->(:DependsOn)-[:TO_DependsOn]->(d:Dependency) RETURN i.id, i.label, d.id, d.label LIMIT 100

query_helpers.description: Inspect routes, endpoints, executed queries, and secret use.
query_helpers.name: runtime_surface
query_helpers.query: MATCH (r:Route)-[:FROM_RoutesTo]->(:RoutesTo)-[:TO_RoutesTo]->(e:APIEndpoint) RETURN r.id, r.label, e.id, e.label LIMIT 100

query_helpers.description: Find documentation chunks connected to code nodes.
query_helpers.name: documentation_context
query_helpers.query: MATCH (d:DocumentationChunk)-[:FROM_Documents]->(:Documents)-[:TO_Documents]->(n) RETURN d.id, d.label, n.id, n.label LIMIT 50

query_helpers.description: Find references that have not been resolved to a semantic target.
query_helpers.name: unresolved_references
query_helpers.query: MATCH (r:Reference) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (r)-[:FROM_ResolvesTo]->(:ResolvesTo)-[:TO_ResolvesTo]->() } RETURN r.id, r.label, r.path, r.line_start LIMIT 100

relation_types.description: Structural containment between repository, files, scopes, declarations, and syntax-derived units.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Contains

relation_types.description: A file, module, scope, or component defines a semantic code node.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Defines

relation_types.description: A source unit imports, includes, requires, or uses another unit.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Imports

relation_types.description: A source unit exports a declaration or public surface.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Exports

relation_types.description: A declaration site introduces a named symbol or subordinate declaration.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Declares

relation_types.description: Connects a node to the lexical or semantic scope used for resolution.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: HasScope

relation_types.description: Connects callables, endpoints, routes, or calls to their parameters or arguments.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: HasParameter

relation_types.description: Connects callables or endpoints to their return type node.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: HasReturnType

relation_types.description: Connects a typed code node to its annotation expression.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: HasTypeAnnotation

relation_types.description: Connects an assignment site or assigned symbol to the target or assigned value.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Assigns

relation_types.description: A source reference mentions another semantic node without necessarily resolving to it.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: References

relation_types.description: A callable or call expression invokes another callable-like target.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Calls

relation_types.description: A declaration is modified by a decorator, annotation, macro, or framework marker.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: DecoratedBy

relation_types.description: A resolver maps a syntactic reference to the best semantic target.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: ResolvesTo

relation_types.description: A repository or code unit depends on an external or internal dependency.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: DependsOn

relation_types.description: Documentation describes a repository, source unit, or semantic declaration.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Documents

relation_types.description: A route or component dispatches to an endpoint or handler.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: RoutesTo

relation_types.description: A source unit exposes a public runtime or module surface.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Exposes

relation_types.description: A code path executes or constructs a query.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: ExecutesQuery

relation_types.description: A code path or dependency uses a secret or sensitive configuration value.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: UsesSecret

relation_types.description: A code path raises or throws an exception flow.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Raises

relation_types.description: A code path handles or catches an exception flow.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: Handles

relation_types.description: A semantic node was derived from a raw parser capture.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: DerivedFrom

relation_types.description: A semantic claim is supported by parser, file, or documentation evidence.

fields.description: Structured relation evidence and resolver details.
fields.name: metadata

relation_types.name: EvidencedBy
